label: Surgery outcome: failure with hediff
description: Surgery failure that applies a specific HediffDef to the patient. Optionally restricted to a set of recipes.

applyToRecipes.label: Apply to recipes
applyToRecipes.description: Optional list of RecipeDefs this outcome applies to. When non-empty, the outcome only fires for the listed recipes.

failedHediff.label: Failed hediff
failedHediff.description: HediffDef applied to the patient when this failure outcome fires.
